_readme: Add these 4 nodes to DV001 after your ElevenLabs audio node. Wire: ElevenLabs → 🎨 Video Format Agent → (parallel) 🖼️ Pixabay Images + 🎵 Pixabay Music → 🔀 Merge: Video Assets → 🎬 Render Dynamic Video

nodes.name: 🎨 Video Format Agent
nodes.notes: LLM decides which video format best fits the episode vibe and script. Uses gpt-4.1-mini for speed.

values.content:
You are the Walk With Me video format director. Your job is to choose the best short-form video format for a devotional episode so it gets maximum watch time on Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

VIDEO FORMAT OPTIONS:
- audiogram: waveform animation on branded background. Best for: raw_confession, late_night_thoughts, quietly_heavy, solo cast, introspective vibes.
- captioned: waveform + auto-captions burned in. Best for: podcast_dialogue, teaching_moment, group_conversation, any dialogue-heavy script.
- slideshow: Ken Burns photo slideshow, no captions. Best for: vignette_scene, vacation_surprise, wonder_awe vibe, scenic or atmospheric settings.
- captioned_slideshow: slideshow + burned captions. Best for: narrative stories, stranger_encounter, family_tension — visual + words together.
- scripture_cards: animated title and scripture text over waveform. Best for: devotional tone, tender_vulnerable, short meditative scripts, scripture-heavy content.
- full: branded intro card + slideshow + captions. Best for: the strongest episodes of the week, funny_real or unexpectedly_joyful vibes, high-energy casts.

RETURN ONLY valid JSON. No explanation outside the JSON object.

nodes.name: 🖼️ Pixabay: Fetch Images
nodes.notes: Fetches up to 5 royalty-free photos from Pixabay matching the agent's image query. Only runs for slideshow formats.

nodes.name: 🎵 Pixabay: Fetch Music
nodes.notes: Fetches ambient background music from Pixabay. Check https://pixabay.com/api/docs/ for the exact music endpoint — it may be /api/music/ or require a media_type param.

nodes.name: 🔀 Merge: Video Assets
nodes.notes: Waits for both Pixabay calls to finish before sending to renderer.

nodes.name: 🎬 Render Dynamic Video
nodes.notes: Sends audio + all metadata to /render-dynamic. Returns MP4 binary.

parameters.name: day_label
parameters.value: ={{ 'Day ' + $('📅 Build Daily Context').item.json.day_of_year + ' · ' + $('📅 Build Daily Context').item.json.day_name }}

parameters.name: image_urls
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify(($('🖼️ Pixabay: Fetch Images').item.json.hits || []).map(h => h.largeImageURL || h.webformatURL).filter(Boolean)) }}

parameters.name: pixabay_music_url
parameters.value: ={{ ($('🎵 Pixabay: Fetch Music').item.json.hits || [])[0]?.audio || ($('🎵 Pixabay: Fetch Music').item.json.hits || [])[0]?.audioUrl || '' }}

wiring: ElevenLabs audio node → 🎨 Video Format Agent
🎨 Video Format Agent → 🖼️ Pixabay: Fetch Images
🎨 Video Format Agent → 🎵 Pixabay: Fetch Music
🖼️ Pixabay: Fetch Images → 🔀 Merge: Video Assets (input 1)
🎵 Pixabay: Fetch Music  → 🔀 Merge: Video Assets (input 2)
🔀 Merge: Video Assets → 🎬 Render Dynamic Video
NOTE: The ElevenLabs audio binary must also reach 🎬 Render Dynamic Video.
Best approach: wire ElevenLabs → 🎬 Render Dynamic Video as a second input,
then use $('ElevenLabs Node').item.binary.data in the audio field instead of $input.
env_vars_needed: PIXABAY_API_KEY  — free at https://pixabay.com/api/docs/ (register → get key)
pixabay_music_note: The Pixabay music API endpoint may differ from the image API. Check https://pixabay.com/api/docs/ and look for the 'Audio' or 'Music' section. The audio file URL field in the response may be called 'audio', 'audioUrl', or 'previewUrl' — update the pixabay_music_url expression in 🎬 Render Dynamic Video accordingly once you confirm the response shape.
